name: Oversized Bolster Woven Striped with Piping Cylinder Throw Pillow White/Light Teal Green - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Cotton Fabric
description: Add a sophisticated look to your space with the Oversized Bolster Woven Stripe with Piping Cylinder Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Designed with white and light teal green stripes, this woven throw pillow adds timeless style to your home. The piping and front tie design add to the look of the bolster pillow. It comes with 100% cotton exterior to help provide a soft and comfy spot to rest your back or arms. Just add textured and grid-patterned square throw pillows to complete the beautiful look.
